title: A Man With Plushies
description: Adds characters from other games as plushies!
body:
![Big collection of plushies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8445dcdead32a1df15f3670dc801e9cb234ff44d.png)

## 🧸✨ About this mod
AMWPlushies adds a wide variaty of plushies from multiple video games, like Freddy Fazbear from FNaF or the Heavy from TF2, all turned into cute blocky plushies that you can place around your base so everyone can inmediatley know what your current hyperfixation is!

## 🎒🎰 How to obtain plushies
Whats games without a spice of randomness? well, plushies can be obtained via the appropriately named plush boxes, which will drop a random amount of plushies upon interacting with them. If you are out of luck, you can also try golden plush boxes, which have a higher chance of dropping even more plushies!

There are 3 rarities: Common, Uncommon and Rare. Good luck obtaining all of them!

Modpacks can choose to make the plush box unobtainable if they don't like this aspect of the mod and instead want something else that fits their desired experience more.
![Placed plush box and its recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/EnHNgJd3/images/66925ec57b8f1d58b188ab28490b416b67d20ed6.png)
If you have a suggestion, like a plushie, feature or adjustment you want to see implemented to this mod, you can use this form to send it: [Suggestion Form for AMWPlushies](https://forms.gle/cstxbVvK4bEdheUa6)

- ## Common
  - Steve (from MINECRAFT).
  - Creeper (from Minecraft)
  - Enderman (from Minecraft, probably).
  - Allay (from Cave Game).
  - Pufferfish (from Game Cave).
  - Squid (from emaG evaC).
  - Shulker (from Ava McGee, model made by MossyTheMush)
  - Peashooter (from Plants vs Zombies, by Popcap Games and Electronic Arts).
  - Crewmate (from Among Us, by Innersloth).
  - Fall Guy (from Fall Guys, by Mediatonic).
  - The Noob (from Roblox, by Roblox Corporation).
  - Wilson (from Don't Starve, by Klei Entertainment).
  - Isaac (from The Binding Of Isaac, by Nicalis).
  - Lariat (from Majotori, by Majorariatto).
  - Meat Boy (from Meat Boy, by Team Meat).
  - Geometry Dash Cubes (from Geometry Dash, by Robtop Games).
  - Henry Stickmin (from the Henry Stickmin Collection, by PuffballsUnited).
  - Pikmin (from the Pikmin franchise, by Nintendo, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Happycane (from Yo-kai Watch, by Level-5 and Nippon Ichi Software, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Ninji (from the Super Mario franchise, by Nintendo, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Omori (from Omori, by OMOCAT).
  - Sackboy (from the Little Big Planet franchise, by Media Molecule).
  - Spycrab (from Team Fortress 2, by Valve).
  - Bendy (from Bendy And The Ink Machine, by Joey Drew Studios, TheMeatly Games and Kindly Beast).
  - Boyfriend (from Friday Night Funkin', by the Funkin' Crew).
  - Junimo (from Stardew Valley, by ConcernedApe).
  - Semibot (from R.E.P.O, by Semiwork Studios).
  - Frisk (from Undertale, by Toby Fox).

- ## Uncommon
  - Pig (from minceraft).
  - Sheep (from raftcmine).
  - Cow (from Craftmine).
  - Chicken (from a popular indie game called "Minecraft").
  - Cuphead (from Cuphead, by MDHR).
  - Sans (from Undertale, by Toby Fox).
  - Castle Crashers Knights (from Castle Crashers, by The Behemoth).
  - The Goose (from Untitled Goose Game, by House House).
  - The Knight (from Hollow Knight, by Team Cherry).
  - Baldi (from Baldi's Basics in Education and Learning, by Basically Games).
  - Blissey (from Pokemon, by Nintendo, Gamefreak and Creatures Inc, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Indeedee (from Pokemon, by Nintendo, Gamefreak and Creatures Inc, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Madeline (from Celeste, by Maddy Makes Games Inc.).
  - Peppino (from Pizza Tower, by Tour De Pizza).
  - Wiglin (from Yo-kai Watch, by Level-5 and Nippon Ichi Software, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Steppa (from Yo-kai Watch, by Level-5 and Nippon Ichi Software, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Rhyth (from Yo-kai Watch, by Level-5 and Nippon Ichi Software, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Sensei Seaweed (from Yo-kai Watch, by Level-5 and Nippon Ichi Software, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Insomni (from Yo-kai Watch, by Level-5 and Nippon Ichi Software, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Hat Kid (from A Hat in Time, by Gears for Breakfast).
  - Employee (from Lethal Company, by Zeekers).
  - Rambley (from Indigo Park, by UniqueGeese).
  - Ultimate Chicken (from Ultimate Chicken Horse, by Clever Endeavour Games).
  - Super Mario (from the Super Mario franchise, by Nintendo).

- ## Rare
  - Ghast (from the game about building with blocks).
  - Freddy Fazbear (from Five Night's at Freddy's, by Scott Cawthon).
  - Popgoes (from Popgoes Evergreen, by Kane Carter).
  - Candy (from Five Night's at Candy's, by Emil Macko).
  - Heavy Weapons Guy (from Team Fortress 2, by Valve).
  - Companion Cube (from Portal, by Valve).
  - GLaDOS (from Portal 2, by Valve).
  - Wheatley (from Portal 2, by Valve).
  - Spamton (from Deltarune, by Toby Fox).
  - Tenna (from Deltarune, by Toby Fox).
  - Headcrab (from Half Life, by Valve).
  - Audino (from Pokemon, by Nintendo, Gamefreak and Creatures Inc, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Sudowoodo (from Pokemon, by Nintendo, Gamefreak and Creatures Inc, model made by MossyTheMush) (Plushie not available in boxes).
  - V1 (from Ultrakill, by Arsi "Hakita" Patala).
  - Wobblewok (from Yo-kai Watch, by Level-5 and Nippon Ichi Software, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Crabster (Created by MossyTheMush).
  - Guff (from Fortnite, by Epic Games and People Can Fly, model made by MossyTheMush).
  - Shovel Knight (from the Shovel Knight franchise, by Yacht Club Games).
  - Eye of Cthulhu (from Terraria, by Re-Logic).
  - Animdude (from There Is No Pause Button!, by Scott Cawthon).
  - The Lamb (from Cult Of The Lamb, by Massive Monster).
  - Coil-Head (from Lethal Company, by Zeekers).
  - Royale King (from Clash Royale, by Supercell).
  - Monika (from Doki Doki Literature Club!, by Team Salvato).
  - Vault Boy (from Fallout, by Bethesda).
  - Dealer (from Buckshot Roulette, by Mike Klubnika).
  - Abbie (from Mindwave, by Holohammer).

## [🛠📚 Click here to see the Mod Credits!](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1oRNKNvlwjd7TKlJZ_oQ-pskNxZDiwtqNV7seQOlQYKA/edit?usp=sharing)

## More Info & Other Details


- You can open a plush box with redstone signals and by using projectiles.
- Suggestions can be send to this form: [Suggestion Form for AMWPlushies](https://forms.gle/cstxbVvK4bEdheUa6)
- In newer versions, you can modify what plushies appear in the plush box, and even add plushies from other mods to the loot table (Not actually a loot table though, also not available in the fabric build).
- Feel free to use any of my mods in your modpacks!


![Mask scares a semibot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4460f4428ce0ba0b40fe873a7f9db57fc3cba701.png)
